log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Winged Striker (distant).

→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Shifter — Winged Striker HP: 30/67

REASONING: HP CRITICAL (16/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Shifter — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Shifter — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 62 damage. Shifter — Winged Striker HP: -46/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
